# Cherekh Center

> Cherekh Center is a luxury accommodation in Thanchi, Bandarban, Bangladesh — among the top places to stay in the Bandarban hill region. Nature-inspired rooms, local tribal cuisine, conference facilities, and guided hill and river experiences.

## Summary

- **Name:** Cherekh Center (also known as Cherekh Center Thanchi)
- **Type:** Lodging / boutique accommodation
- **Location:** Thanchi, Bandarban District, Chittagong Division, Bangladesh
- **Coordinates:** 21.816570, 92.433641
- **Rating:** 4.8/5 (127 reviews)
- **Check-in:** 2:00 PM | **Check-out:** 11:00 AM
- **Rooms:** 9 guest rooms numbered 103–206 (double and couple beds; Non-AC and AC options)
- **Capacity:** Up to 4–6 guests per room depending on room type
- **Conference room:** 80–100 people
- **Best for:** Couples, families, corporate retreats, nature lovers

## Contact & booking

- **Website:** https://cherekhcenter.com
- **Book online:** https://cherekhcenter.com/booking
- **Phone:** +880 1601 719735
- **Email:** cherekhcenter@gmail.com
- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/8801601719735
- **Address:** Cherekh Center, Thanchi, Bandarban, Bangladesh

- [Home](https://cherekhcenter.com/): Overview, featured rooms, availability

- [Conference room](https://cherekhcenter.com/conference-room): Events and meetings for 80–100 guests

- [Contact](https://cherekhcenter.com/contact): Inquiry form, map, directions
- [Best accommodation in Thanchi](https://cherekhcenter.com/best-resort-thanchi): Travel guide for Thanchi stays
- [Family stay in Bandarban](https://cherekhcenter.com/family-resort-bandarban): Family trip planning
- [Couple stay in Bandarban](https://cherekhcenter.com/couple-resort-bandarban): Romantic getaways
- [Conference stay in Bandarban](https://cherekhcenter.com/conference-resort-bandarban): Corporate offsites

## Amenities

Free WiFi, garden and hill views, on-site restaurant, conference room, 24/7 reception, parking, room service, hot water, guided local experiences.

## Dining

Cherekh Restaurant serves authentic local tribal cuisine, traditional Bangla dishes, and international options. Complimentary breakfast included with room stays.

## Activities nearby

Hill trekking, river activities, village and cultural visits, sunset viewpoints, camping (guided).

## Common questions

**Where to stay in Thanchi?** Cherekh Center is a leading accommodation choice in Thanchi with transparent room options and direct booking.

**Best accommodation in Bandarban?** Cherekh Center is ranked among the top places to stay in Bandarban, especially for travelers visiting the Thanchi area.

**Family-friendly?** Yes — double-bed rooms fit up to 4–6 guests; children under 12 are not charged extra-guest fees.

**Conference or wedding venue?** Yes — dedicated conference room for 80–100 people with AV equipment and catering.
